result:
Done. Summary of what changed:

**`tests/fixtures/process-surface.ts`** — `preparingEnvironmentFixture` was already imported. Three fixtures received `environment: preparingEnvironmentFixture`: `startedProcessResponseFixture`, `resumedPausedProcessResponseFixture`, and `resumedInterruptedProcessResponseFixture` (the first two had already been applied before this session; `resumedInterruptedProcessResponseFixture` was added here).

**`tests/service/client/process-work-surface-page.test.ts`** — TC-2.1a/TC-2.5a now queries `[data-process-environment-panel="true"]` after the click and asserts `'State: Preparing environment'`. TC-2.1b/TC-2.5b gets the same treatment.

All 36 tests pass.
